differential_diagnoses: Metastatic malignancy with bone marrow infiltration (myelophthisis)
Occult solid tumor (e.g., lung or pancreatic cancer)
Severe vitamin B12 or copper deficiency
next_steps: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry, cytogenetics, and staining for malignancy and granulomas
CT of the chest with contrast to evaluate lung nodules and mediastinal adenopathy
Comprehensive HLH diagnostic workup (soluble IL-2 receptor, NK cell activity)
Serum amylase and lipase trend monitoring and supportive management of pancreatitis
Oncology and hematology consultation for evaluation of leukoerythroblastic blood picture
Whole-body PET/CT scan to localize primary malignancy

differential_diagnoses: Metastatic carcinoma with bone marrow infiltration (myelophthisis)
Disseminated intravascular coagulation (DIC) secondary to malignancy
Paraneoplastic panniculitis or systemic inflammatory syndrome (from pancreatic disease)
next_steps: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry, cytogenetics, and specialized staining
Full HLH diagnostic workup (soluble IL-2 receptor, fibrinogen, triglycerides, NK cell activity)
Contrast-enhanced CT of the chest to investigate pulmonary nodules
EUS-guided fine-needle aspiration of the pancreatic tail/lesion to investigate malignancy
Monitoring of coagulation profile and supportive care for cytopenias and pancreatitis
